description: SkyWatch provides access to satellite imagery and geospatial data, including archive search, tasking, pricing, ordering, and related organization management features. Its platform is aimed at developers and organizations integrating Earth observation data into their applications.
summary: SkyWatch exposes a REST API at https://api.skywatch.co/earthcache authenticated by an `x-api-key`, plus a public MCP server at https://api.skywatch.co/mcp with no authentication.
